EUROPEAN LONG-TERM INVESTMENT FUNDS
(INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT)

[ L.S.370.31

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.31
REGOLAMENTI DWAR EUROPEAN
LONG-TERM INVESTMENT FUNDS
(INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT)*
4 ta’ Marzu, 2016
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 70 tal-2016.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġre ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
